stories.title: Set up Renovate for automated dependency updates
acceptance_criteria: renovate.json exists in repo root with valid config
Patch updates set to automerge
Minor updates grouped weekly
Major updates as individual PRs
Cloudflare-specific deps pinned to minor range
stories.context: Create renovate.json in repo root. Config: automerge patch, group minor weekly, major individual PRs. Pin @cloudflare/workers-types and wrangler to minor range. Enable vulnerability alerts.

stories.title: Add Sentry APM for runtime error tracking
acceptance_criteria: @sentry/cloudflare installed in package.json
Sentry initialized in src/worker/index.ts
Unhandled errors captured in global error handler
SENTRY_DSN added to wrangler.toml vars and .dev.vars.example
TypeScript compiles and unit tests pass
stories.context: Install @sentry/cloudflare (NOT @sentry/node — this is CF Workers). Initialize in index.ts fetch handler. Wrap with Sentry.withSentry() or use toucanjs/toucan-js if @sentry/cloudflare not available. Capture errors in the global onError handler at line 89-103. Add SENTRY_DSN to Env type in lib/types.ts. Add placeholder to wrangler.toml [vars] and .dev.vars.example.

stories.title: Decompose src/worker/index.ts into route registry and middleware chain
acceptance_criteria: src/worker/index.ts is <80 lines (thin entry point)
Route registration extracted to src/worker/routes/registry.ts
Middleware chain extracted to src/worker/middleware/chain.ts
All imports updated across codebase
All unit and integration tests pass
stories.context: src/worker/index.ts is ~262 lines and the #1 hotspot. Extract: 1) Route registration (app.route() calls) into routes/registry.ts exporting a function registerRoutes(app). 2) Middleware setup (app.use() calls) into middleware/chain.ts exporting applyMiddleware(app). 3) Keep index.ts as: create app, applyMiddleware(app), registerRoutes(app), export default app. Run npx vitest run after.

stories.title: Increase DI adoption in worker modules
acceptance_criteria: rate-limiter.ts accepts KV binding via factory function parameter
classifier.ts accepts AI binding via factory function parameter
campaign-aggregator.ts accepts KV binding via parameter
Route handlers pass bindings from Hono context
Tests use injected mocks instead of env stubs
All tests pass
stories.context: Refactor 3 key modules to accept dependencies as parameters instead of accessing env directly. Pattern: export function createRateLimiter(kv: KVNamespace) { return { isAllowed(key, limit, window) {...} } }. Routes call createRateLimiter(c.env.CACHE). Tests call createRateLimiter(mockKv). Do NOT introduce a DI container — just function parameters.

stories.title: Raise vitest coverage thresholds to 60%
acceptance_criteria: vitest.config.ts thresholds: lines 60%, statements 60%, branches 50%, functions 70%
npx vitest run --coverage passes with new thresholds
If coverage is below, add tests for uncovered files in src/worker/routes/ and src/worker/lib/
stories.context: Update vitest.config.ts coverage thresholds. Run npx vitest run --coverage to check current levels. If below new thresholds, add tests for the least-covered files. Focus on src/worker/routes/ and src/worker/lib/ which have the most business logic. Do NOT add trivial tests just to hit numbers — test meaningful behavior.

stories.title: Add tests for uncovered route handlers
acceptance_criteria: Test files exist for all route handlers in src/worker/routes/
Each test covers happy path and error cases
Coverage meets 60% lines threshold
All tests pass
stories.context: After S-370a sets thresholds, identify route files without tests (check src/worker/routes/*.ts vs src/worker/routes/*.test.ts). Add tests for uncovered handlers. Use miniflare env mocking pattern from existing tests. Focus on: alerts.ts, community.ts, newsletter.ts, feed.ts if they lack tests.
